mission.title: Install and Configure Cdk For Kubernetes Cdk8s- on Kubernetes
mission.description: cdk8s is an open-source software development framework that allows you to define Kubernetes applications and abstractions using familiar programming languages and rich object-oriented APIs. Installing cdk8s enables you to synthesize Kubernetes manifests that can be applied to any Kubernetes cluster.

steps.title: Install cdk8s CLI
steps.description:
Install the cdk8s CLI globally:
```bash
npm install -g cdk8s-cli
```
Or via Homebrew:
```bash
brew install cdk8s
```

steps.title: Initialize a cdk8s project
steps.description:
Create a new cdk8s project:
```bash
mkdir my-cdk8s-app && cd my-cdk8s-app
cdk8s init typescript-app
```
This generates a TypeScript project with cdk8s constructs.

steps.title: Synthesize Kubernetes manifests
steps.description:
Build and synthesize your cdk8s app into YAML manifests:
```bash
npm run build
cdk8s synth
```
This generates Kubernetes YAML in the `dist/` directory.

steps.title: Apply to a cluster
steps.description:
Deploy the generated manifests:
```bash
kubectl apply -f dist/
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
```bash
cdk8s --version
ls dist/
kubectl get all
```

resolution.summary: cdk8s CLI is installed for defining Kubernetes resources using familiar programming languages.

uninstall.title: Remove cdk8s CLI
uninstall.description:
```bash
npm uninstall -g cdk8s-cli
# Or: brew uninstall cdk8s
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade cdk8s
upgrade.description:
```bash
npm update -g cdk8s-cli
# Or: brew upgrade cdk8s
```

troubleshooting.title: Synth produces empty output
troubleshooting.description: Check your main.ts for construct definitions. The default template includes a sample chart.

troubleshooting.title: TypeScript compilation errors
troubleshooting.description:
```bash
npm run build
```
Check for missing imports or type errors in your constructs.

prerequisites.description: Node.js 18+ and npm required. kubectl and a cluster needed for deployment.
